checks.name: HTML Validation
checks.command: echo 'Static site — no build step. Checking file existence and basic structure...' && find . -name '*.html' -not -path './node_modules/*' | head -5 && echo 'HTML files found: OK'

checks.name: CSS Syntax
checks.command: for f in css/*.css; do node -e "try { require('fs').readFileSync('$f','utf8'); } catch(e) { process.exit(1); }" && echo "✅ $f readable"; done

checks.name: JS Syntax
checks.command: for f in js/*.js; do node --check "$f" && echo "✅ $f valid"; done

checks.name: JSON Valid
checks.command: cat ralph/prd.json | jq empty && echo '✅ prd.json valid' && cat vercel.json | jq empty && echo '✅ vercel.json valid'

checks.name: No Broken Links
checks.command: grep -rn 'href="#"' index.html about/index.html services/index.html pricing/index.html blog/index.html contact/index.html | grep -v '#main\|#services\|#pricing\|#about\|#blog\|#contact\|#testimonials' && echo '❌ Still has placeholder #' links' || echo '✅ No placeholder # links'

checks.name: Mobile Fixes on Blog
checks.command: grep -l 'mobile-fixes.css' blog/posts/*.html | wc -l | xargs -I{} echo 'Blog posts with mobile-fixes.css: {}'

checks.name: OG Tags Present
checks.command: grep -l 'og:title' index.html about/index.html services/index.html pricing/index.html blog/index.html contact/index.html | wc -l | xargs -I{} echo 'Pages with OG tags: {}/6'
